title: terra_atmos
description: The sound effects of MAtoms used in TFC.
body:
# Introduction
An unofficial remake of the classic mod MAtmos, custom-made for TFC: TNG.
Using MAtmos's classic sound pack, you can hear this classic music when you're in TFC.
# Ambient Sounds
## Wind
Outdoors, you will hear the sound of the wind from time to time, with the audio changing according to the current season.  
By the lake, there is also the added sound of water.
## Wildlife
When the player is in a warmer area, you can hear birds chirping.
If the temperature is high, it will change to the sounds of crickets and cicadas.
And if you're by the seaside, you'll hear the sounds of seagulls.
## Waves
By the sea, you can hear the sound of the ocean.
# Block Sounds
## Waterfalls and Rivers
Now waterfalls (flowing water) and rivers have unique turbulent sounds.
## Barrel on Rainy Days
Now the barrel will make the sound of water droplets when it collects water, and the volume will change depending on the amount of rainfall.
# Player Sounds
## Switching Items
Switching items now triggers different sounds, controlled by tags.
There are also differences in sound volume based on the number of stacked items.
## Diving/Falling from Height
Some replacements of the original sounds.
